texto: Molly stood up. You made an error! She felt like saying. A bad throw. So what? It's a baseball game. A game. Who really cares? A bad throw? In the great scheme of things? A bad throw? Of course she didn't say that. She understood that your own errors always feel tragic.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Mick Cochrane: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Molly stood up. You made an error! She felt like saying. A bad throw. So what? It's a baseball ga…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, errors, sports pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de sports.
